summary:
Claim: In alpha-thalassemia trait, electrophoresis shows normal HbF and normal HbA2.  
Evidence: - Deletions affect only alpha-globin genes, leaving gamma-globin production intact. - No disruption of delta-globin gene function; hence HbA2 remains unaltered.  
Answer: B
formatted_summary:

Evidence: - Deletions affect only alpha-globin genes, leaving gamma-globin production intact. - No disruption of delta-globin gene function; hence HbA2 remains unaltered.  
Answer: B. Answer choice: B
